title: Changes to Bump Behavior and some other fixes

texts: Changed bump cooldown from 10 to 5 minutes.
Moved the bump arrow to below the rating in reviews.
Changed to color of the bump arrow from a fixed grey to based on the site customization settings.
Added the bump count to the display. It starts out faded and gradually becomes clearer with more bumps.
Added a potential fix to the MD Plan editor sometimes crashing when using the spec build recommendation mode with additional details toggled open.
